content.scenarioHint: 你在展示一项教育研究时，听众质疑该方法是否适用于不同学习环境，你需要提出一个开放性问题来探讨其可迁移性。
content.responseTemplate: Could the core principles of this approach be ___ in other contexts?
content.hint: 表达‘可迁移’或‘可调整’时，常用动词是 adapted，表示根据新环境修改适用
强调设计初衷是解决资源有限的现实问题，而非依赖理想条件

blanks.answer: it simplifies instruction so teachers can manage even with limited resources
options: it requires expensive equipment that most schools can't afford
it simplifies instruction so teachers can manage even with limited resources
we only tested it in elite schools
it works only if students are already high achievers

content.situation: 在学术会议上，一位听众质疑你的教育技术研究只适用于特定环境，无法推广到普通学校。
content.speakerText: This feels too specific to pilot schools—how can it work in regular classrooms with larger classes and less support?
content.speakerTextCn: 这看起来只适合试点学校——在班级更大、支持更少的普通课堂里，它怎么行得通？
content.knowledgePoint: 用设计初衷证明普适性
content.responseTemplate: It’s built for exactly that context—___
